$comment: Per-kind default TTL windows in days. null means no expiry. Operationalized in tools/prune.py and tools/compress.py. The recommended values follow Sei (strategy ~6mo, weekly ~3mo, legal never) plus 5 additional kinds the user is most likely to encounter via the harvester.

_overrides.$comment: Frontmatter convention: setting `expiry_locked: true` on a memory object prevents the compression pipeline from overwriting `expires_at` on re-compression. F3 mitigation.
